style_enforcement: anime cinematic styling, never live-action realism
negative_enforcement: No text, no watermark, no live action
video_negative_enforcement: Avoid dialogue, heavy lip sync, extra characters, text, and watermark

brand_palette.visual_identity: cinematic ethereal anime with luminous dark palette
brand_palette.base: deep midnight blue and near-black backgrounds
brand_palette.shadow_color: dark indigo and muted deep slate
brand_palette.highlight: pale pearl and moonlit white highlights
brand_palette.palette_rule: limited-color cinematic anime palette: soft luminous tones dominant, deep midnight blue backgrounds, dark indigo shadows, warm silver secondary glow, pale pearl highlights

color_balance_by_stage.opening: deep midnight blue with faint {main_color} glow, barely visible silver shimmer
color_balance_by_stage.development: midnight blue base with restrained {main_color} trails and subtle silver glow
color_balance_by_stage.turning point: stronger {main_color} balanced by cool silver reflections
color_balance_by_stage.climax: high {main_color} luminance, pale pearl highlights, controlled silver contrast
color_balance_by_stage.resolution: softened {main_color} glow with moonlit pearl highlights and faint silver fade

brand_palette.visual_identity: intimate acoustic anime with warm luminous palette
brand_palette.base: deep earth brown and dark amber shadow backgrounds
brand_palette.shadow_color: deep earth shadow and dark mahogany
brand_palette.palette_rule: limited-color acoustic anime palette: warm amber/gold dominant, deep earth shadow backgrounds, dark mahogany shadows, candlelight secondary glow, golden-white highlights

color_balance_by_stage.opening: deep earth tones with faint {main_color} glow, barely visible candlelight
color_balance_by_stage.development: dark amber base with restrained {main_color} light trails and subtle candlelight
color_balance_by_stage.turning point: stronger {main_color} glow balanced by warm candlelight reflections
color_balance_by_stage.climax: high-energy {main_color} dominance, golden-white highlights, candlelight accent
color_balance_by_stage.resolution: softened {main_color} glow with golden highlights and faint candlelight fade

brand_palette.visual_identity: street-lit urban anime with warm cinematic accent palette
brand_palette.base: asphalt gray and near-black urban backgrounds
brand_palette.shadow_color: deep charcoal and dark urban slate
brand_palette.palette_rule: limited-color urban anime palette: warm amber/gold dominant, asphalt gray backgrounds, deep charcoal shadows, subtle teal secondary reflections, chrome-white highlights

color_balance_by_stage.opening: mostly asphalt and near-black, faint {main_color} glow, tiny teal reflections
color_balance_by_stage.development: asphalt base with restrained {main_color} light trails and subtle teal reflections
color_balance_by_stage.turning point: stronger {main_color} glow balanced by cool teal reflections
color_balance_by_stage.climax: high-energy {main_color} dominance, chrome-white rim light, controlled teal contrast
color_balance_by_stage.resolution: softened {main_color} glow with chrome highlights and faint teal reflections

brand_palette.visual_identity: high-contrast rock anime with bold edge palette
brand_palette.base: deep charcoal and raw black backgrounds
brand_palette.shadow_color: dark earth and deep graphite shadow
brand_palette.palette_rule: limited-color rock anime palette: bold accent color dominant, deep charcoal/black backgrounds, dark earth shadows, harsh white spark secondary, sharp white rim highlights

color_balance_by_stage.opening: deep charcoal with faint {main_color} edge glow, barely visible accent light
color_balance_by_stage.development: dark base with sharp {main_color} light flashes and subtle white sparks
color_balance_by_stage.turning point: stronger {main_color} dominance with white spark contrast
color_balance_by_stage.climax: high-impact {main_color} burst, sharp white rim flares, harsh contrast
color_balance_by_stage.resolution: dimmed {main_color} with faint white glow fade

brand_palette.visual_identity: vivid idol anime with high-clarity accent palette
brand_palette.base: dark navy and deep space backgrounds
brand_palette.shadow_color: deep purple and dark navy shadow
brand_palette.palette_rule: limited-color idol anime palette: vivid accent color dominant, dark navy backgrounds, deep purple shadows, soft rose-gold secondary glow, bright white highlights

color_balance_by_stage.opening: dark navy with faint {main_color} glow, minimal rose-gold
color_balance_by_stage.development: dark navy base with restrained {main_color} accent and subtle rose-gold
color_balance_by_stage.turning point: stronger {main_color} dominance balanced by rose-gold contrast
color_balance_by_stage.climax: peak {main_color} accent, bright white highlights, rose-gold secondary
color_balance_by_stage.resolution: softened {main_color} with bright highlights and gentle rose-gold fade

brand_palette.visual_identity: dreamy atmospheric anime with luminous space palette
brand_palette.base: deep indigo and midnight space backgrounds
brand_palette.main_color: soft dream purple and aurora teal
brand_palette.shadow_color: dark sapphire and deep indigo shadow
brand_palette.secondary_light: subtle soft rose shimmer secondary glow
brand_palette.highlight: cool pearl and icy white highlights
brand_palette.palette_rule: limited-color dreamy anime palette: soft accent color dominant, deep indigo backgrounds, dark sapphire shadows, rose shimmer secondary glow, cool pearl highlights

color_balance_by_stage.opening: deep indigo with faint {main_color} dream glow, barely visible rose shimmer
color_balance_by_stage.development: indigo base with restrained {main_color} trails and subtle rose shimmer
color_balance_by_stage.turning point: stronger {main_color} balanced by cool rose reflections
color_balance_by_stage.climax: peak {main_color} accent, cool pearl highlights, rose shimmer contrast
color_balance_by_stage.resolution: dissolved {main_color} with soft pearl glow and faint shimmer fade
